title: In-Band Signal Compliance (IBSC) / signalbench: one metric for prompt injection and temporal blindness
description: A benchmark and a single metric (Signal-Response Correctness) that unify over-compliance (prompt injection) and under-compliance (temporal blindness, access-deny, memory-label, bot-policy) for LLM agents into one leaderboard. Includes the zero-dependency signalbench harness, an action-based deterministic grader, results for six frontier models plus a Claude Code deployed-agent contrast, and the raw per-item responses. Apache-2.0.
